education.degree: Bachelor of Technology - BTech, Computer Science

experience.description: Leading the development of an open-source platform that helps citizens verify medicines and report suspicious drugs. Architecting the system for low-bandwidth environments with multi-lingual access across India.

Led code reviews for 33+ contributors across 80+ PRs on LegalHub. Architected MVC backend; shipped AI legal Q&A and real-time WebSocket chat. Set up CI/CD via GitHub Actions with automated Jest test runs.
Completed intensive field training within the Signal & Telecom Department. Gained hands-on insights into railway networking architecture, telecommunications infrastructure, and signal engineering.
Architected the backend for a scalable e-commerce application using Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. Built robust RESTful APIs for product management, secure JWT authentication, and order processing.
Evaluated and authored solutions for 500+ complex technical problems across DSA, System Design, and DBMS. Maintained a 4.8/5 quality rating over 18 months.
Gained hands-on experience setting up and maintaining network systems, including enterprise routers and switches. Navigated device CLIs and utilized tools like PuTTY.
